QF.id: III-C Prevention of Money Laundering Act_3

question.text: For certain offences specified in Paragraph 2 of Part A of the Schedule to PMLA, the imprisonment may extend to:

explanation.text: **The Logic:** As per Section 9.2, for offences specified in Paragraph 2 of Part A, the term shall not be less than 3 years but may extend to 10 years. **The Trap:** The general provision of 7 years is often confused with this enhanced provision. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** These aggravated offences typically involve larger amounts or more serious predicate offences.
